selected_companies.reason: World's largest CoWoS customer driving ABF substrate demand. Key for understanding ABF market dynamics and supply chain pressure points.
Second largest CoWoS customer after NVIDIA. EPYC server CPUs and Instinct MI-series GPUs use advanced ABF substrates.
Major ABF substrate consumer for server CPUs (Xeon). Also expanding foundry services with advanced packaging (EMIB, Foveros) that use ABF.
